speaker: Frank Elderson
tone_summary: Elderson's sole speech in the window is entirely focused on nature-related financial risks and the work of the NGFS (Network for Greening the Financial System). There is no monetary policy content, no rate signalling, and no hawkishness signal whatsoever. His mandate focus is on supervisory and climate risk frameworks. He scores at the low end purely by default — not dovish in a monetary policy sense, simply off-topic from a rate perspective.
representative_quote: Coming together, cooperating and engaging with one another across borders is possible and indeed imperative in times of profound disruption and volatility.
